content: Remote OK Team Member Special Assignment Reliance Industries Limited <strong>Job Responsibilities :<br><br></strong><ul><li>Meet with clients to discuss the space that requires artwork, and must communicate effectively with clients throughout the consultation process</li><li>May offer custom framing, allowing the artwork to flow perfectly in specific spaces</li><li> Install or place the artwork in such a way that it will achieve the overall look, mood or feel that the client desires </li><li> May be involved in art appraisal due to their expertise in the field of artwork </li><li> Work closely with local, national and international galleries, as well as local artists and other reliable art sources in order to provide the best and most broad range of art possible for their clients </li><li> May commission artwork to be custom made for clients, or for special occasion </li><li> Work with a variety of budgets and spaces </li><li> Must maintain good relationship with various artists, galleries, their managers and proprietors </li><li> Must stay up to date with the newest trends in the art community <br><br><br></li></ul><strong>Education Requirement :<br><br></strong>Masters in Arts Business<br><br><strong>Experience Requirement :<br><br></strong><ul><li> 6-8 years# experience<br><br><br></li></ul><strong>Skills &amp; Competencies :<br><br></strong><ul><li> Excellent Interpersonal Skills</li><li> Excellent Negotiation Skills</li><li> Good Networking Ability</li></ul> education, non tech Jamnagar, 2026-06-05T16:53:33+00:00 1132936 https://remoteOK.com/remote-jobs/remote-team-member-special-assignment-reliance-industries-limited-1132936 https://remoteOK.com/assets/logo-square.png Administrative Coordinator UppalCorp <p><strong>Company Description</strong></p><p><br></p><p>UppalCorp specializes in commodities sourcing, trade, and management consulting, leveraging a dynamic team of digital innovators. Our passionate industry experts provide strategic guidance in sourcing, performance improvement, and international trade. We are committed to empowering businesses with tailored solutions for complex decision-making. At UppalCorp, we value growth, collaboration, and innovation to make a global impact.</p><p><br></p><p><strong>Role Description</strong></p><p><br></p><p>This is a full-time remote role for an Administrative Coordinator with occasional business travel as required. The Administrative Coordinator will manage daily administrative tasks, maintain schedules, coordinate communication, and provide clerical support to executives. Responsibilities include organizing documentation, scheduling meetings, managing calls, and ensuring smooth office operations, tailored to support the needs of a dynamic team.</p><p><br></p><p><strong>Qualifications</strong></p><p><br></p><ul><li>Proven experience in an administrative, executive support, or similar role; prior experience supporting executives is considered an asset.</li><li>Proficiency in administrative assistance, clerical functions, calendar management, and task coordination.</li><li>Excellent verbal and written communication skills, with strong professional phone etiquette and interpersonal abilities.</li><li>Exceptional organizational and time-management skills, with the ability to prioritize multiple tasks, manage competing deadlines, and work independently in a fast-paced remote environment.</li><li>High level of accuracy, attention to detail, and commitment to maintaining efficient administrative processes.</li><li>Proficiency with Microsoft Office Suite and other common office software, collaboration tools, and technology platforms.</li><li>Strong professional judgment, integrity, and discretion when handling confidential and commercially sensitive information, with a demonstrated ability to safeguard proprietary business, financial, and operational data.</li><li>Ability to collaborate effectively with executives, internal teams, and external stakeholders while maintaining professionalism and confidentiality.</li><li>Willingness and ability to travel occasionally for
